intro: ^Yabai... There's no way we're getting into UTokyo like this!
^Don't be so dramatic, all that's really left is to maintain my GPA anyway.
^If you're not careful, everything will fall apart! Ka-kaw!
^Stay focused! Time to study! Time to study!
meetingkazumi: ^In case you're wondering, I'm still bummed out about yesterday.
^The one time I managed to achieve the impossible... the world had to turn its back on me.
^It's not like that cafe is going anywhere, you could go today.
^That's not the important thing, I managed to convince YOU to come with me yesterday.
^I guess that really was the only time I've skipped cram school, huh.
^My parents would kill me if they found out.
^They won't! And anyway, your mom loves me, so-...
^Alright, okay. But if it rains like that again today, we'll just have to go another time, okay?
^I won't even be out for long!
^Did you forget that there's a test tomorrow? You must ace it! Go study! Go study!
^You know that I’ve already done the practice tests multiple times, it was covered in cram school a while ago. So just—
